---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see added.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would enable. For example: "As a user managing large GridFS buckets, I want to... so that I can..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include UI mockups, API designs, or any relevant details if you have them.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered, and why the proposed solution is preferred.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples from similar tools that illustrate the feature.
